title: Uruguayan Smoky Vegan Stir Fry
description: A smoky, plant-based stir fry inspired by Uruguayan cuisine. A flavorful and spicy dish that's perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, chili flakes, and garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the smoky tofu and cook until browned on all sides, about 3-4 minutes.
Stir in the soy sauce and cook for 1 minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Optional: serve with steamed vegetables or rice.
